cloudflareOutputEvidence.text: | `site/` | static portfolio site source | published recruiter-facing web content |
- Runtime remains static HTML/CSS/JS under `site/` (no framework lock-in).
- Design tokens and fluid layout primitives: `site/assets/design-system.css`.
- `PROOF_PACK/verified_counts.json` and `site/assets/verified-counts.json` stay in sync with verified counts.
This repository is a static site deployment from `site/`.
- Why: pages are static HTML/CSS/JS in `site/`, and data artifacts are generated by Node scripts before publish.
Docs-only execution checklist for Cloudflare Pages hosting validation.
- build command, publish directory (`site/`), branch mapping, environment notes
- [ ] Cloudflare Pages production deploy screenshot/log link.
- [ ] Cloudflare Pages preview deploy screenshot/log link.

rootCauseRanking.title: Mixed local asset path strategies + trailing slash route variance
rootCauseRanking.whyIntermittent: Relative asset URLs can resolve differently for /page versus /page/, so different canonicalization outcomes produce different asset paths per deploy and cache state.
rootCauseRanking.howToConfirm: In DevTools Network, compare requests for /security and /security/. Look for /security/assets/... 404s versus /assets/... 200s.
rootCauseRanking.minimalFix: Standardize local asset references to root-absolute paths (/assets/...) across all HTML pages.

rootCauseRanking.title: Fetch URL inconsistency and missing timeout/fallback behavior
rootCauseRanking.whyIntermittent: Relative fetch URLs are document-URL dependent and can fail under slash variants; fetches without timeout/fallback can leave permanent loading placeholders.
rootCauseRanking.howToConfirm: Use DevTools Network + Console on live pages and force slow/offline mode. Failed JSON requests without UI fallback indicate hanging lanes.
rootCauseRanking.minimalFix: Use root-absolute fetch URLs (/assets/data/...) and enforce a 1.5-2.0s timeout with fallback rendering.

rootCauseRanking.title: Generated artifacts can drift from deployment inputs
rootCauseRanking.whyIntermittent: If generated JSON artifacts are not consistently present (or generated from stale content), deploy output can differ even when source HTML appears unchanged.
rootCauseRanking.howToConfirm: Check Cloudflare build logs for generation script execution and verify deployed files under /assets/data and /assets/verified-counts.json.
rootCauseRanking.minimalFix: Guarantee generation step in build command and add CI assertion that required artifacts exist before deploy.

rootCauseRanking.title: Edge/browser cache mixing old HTML with newer JS/CSS payloads
rootCauseRanking.whyIntermittent: A stale HTML shell can reference outdated script paths or mount contracts while newer assets are cached separately, causing progressive inconsistent behavior.
rootCauseRanking.howToConfirm: Hard refresh + cache-disabled devtools test. Compare response headers and ETags for HTML vs JS assets across affected and unaffected sessions.
rootCauseRanking.minimalFix: Set short cache for HTML and immutable cache strategy for fingerprinted assets; purge cache on critical routing/path changes.

rootCauseRanking.title: Repository/owner rename leftovers and external raw URL dependencies
rootCauseRanking.whyIntermittent: Old owner URLs may redirect unpredictably across mirrors/caches; raw.githubusercontent dependencies are sensitive to owner/repo/path changes.
rootCauseRanking.howToConfirm: Search deployed source for raylee-hawkins and raw.githubusercontent.com, then test those links directly for redirects or 404s.
rootCauseRanking.minimalFix: Replace old owner references with raylee-hawkins and prefer same-origin packaged assets over raw external URLs.

ciSanityCheckSuggestion.description: Fail CI if relative local asset references, slash-hazard paths, or unresolved local assets are detected.

localServer: Test both /security and /security/ to validate relative-path behavior.
